pattern: QA-LoRA twin + LoftQ + QLoRA + standard PEFT freeze; cuneiform metaphor adds wedge-vocab restriction but mechanism collapsed onto quantize-aware adapter freeze

honest_audit.borderline_notes: Adapter quantize+freeze is the dominant 2024-2026 PEFT pattern; CUNEIFORM's wedge-template-vocabulary restriction is the only marginally distinct piece but is itself a generic 'narrow-domain prompt' practice.
